THETREASURER-STEAL.title: Steal
THETREASURER-STEAL.description: #Deal !D! damage. Gain *Gold equal to unblocked damage dealt.
THETREASURER-MONEY_EQUALS_POWER.title: Money = Power
THETREASURER-MONEY_EQUALS_POWER.descript: #Gain [E] at the start of your turn if *Gold > 100.
THETREASURER-MUG.title: Mug
THETREASURER-MUG.description: #Deal !D! damage. If the enemy intends to attack, apply 2 *Weak and gain !GoldGain! *Gold.
THETREASURER-ALLOWANCE.title: Allowance
THETREASURER-BRING_BACK.title: Bring Back
THETREASURER-BRING_BACK.description: #Choose a card in your *Discard Pile. Add it to your *Hand and enchant it with *Spiral 1 this combat.

#Create a random common, uncommon, or rare *Resin *Relic.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-RANSOM.title: Ransom
THETREASURER-ACE_HIGH.title: Ace High
THETREASURER-ACE_HIGH.description: #Deal !D! damage. If this card is enchanted, play it twice and remove its enchantment.
THETREASURER-BANKRUPTCY.title: Bankruptcy
THETREASURER-BANKRUPTCY.description: #Lose all *Gold. Enchant all cards in your hand with *Replay 1 this combat. Can only be played with 50 or more *Gold.
THETREASURER-BIG_SPENDER.title: Big Spender
THETREASURER-BIG_SPENDER.description: #Lose !GoldLoss! *Gold. Gain 2 [E]. Draw 3 cards. Create a random *Resin *Relic.
THETREASURER-BUY_OUT.title: Buy Out
THETREASURER-BUY_OUT.description: #Lose X * 15 *Gold. Create X random *Resin *Relics and draw X cards. +1 X when upgraded.
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM.title: Charm Form
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM.description: #When a card is drawn, apply a random enchantment to it for this combat. *Ethereal.
THETREASURER-GAMBLING_ADDICTION.title: Gambling Addiction
THETREASURER-GAMBLING_ADDICTION.descript: #Lose 5-10 *Gold each turn. Gain 1 [E] and draw !DrawAmt! card(s). If you lose all *Gold, you die.
THETREASURER-GETAWAY.title: Getaway
THETREASURER-GETAWAY.description: #When a *Power is played, enchant a random card in your hand with *Swift 2.
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI.title: Kintsugi
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI.description: #Whenever a *Resin *Relic is destroyed, gain 5 *Gold and enchant !EnchantCount! random card(s) in your hand with a random enchantment.
THETREASURER-LIFE_INSURANCE.title: Life Insurance
THETREASURER-LIFE_INSURANCE.description: #When you die, revive with 1 HP and lose !GoldLoss! *Gold.
THETREASURER-MANA_BUILD.title: Mana Build
THETREASURER-MANA_BUILD.description:
#Choose an enchanted card. Remove its enchantment. Gain 2 [E] and draw !DrawAmt! card(s).
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-PERFECT_COUNTERFEIT.title: Perfect Counterfeit
THETREASURER-PERFECT_COUNTERFEIT.descrip: #Deal !D! damage. Create a *Resin copy of a random non-*Resin relic. If this kills, keep the copy permanently.

THETREASURER-SOLIDIFY.title: Solidify
THETREASURER-FROM_THE_ASHES.title: From the Ashes
THETREASURER-FROM_THE_ASHES.description: #Deal 6 damage !Hits! time(s). If this kills an enemy, create a random rare *Resin *Relic.

THETREASURER-DEFEND_TREASURER.title: Defend

THETREASURER-CAPTIVATE.description: #Deal !D! damage. If this card is enchanted, gain !B! *Block.

THETREASURER-CHINA_BULL.title: China Bull
THETREASURER-COIN_TOSS.title: Coin Toss
THETREASURER-COIN_TOSS.description: #Deal !D! damage !Hits! time(s) to all enemies. Gain !GoldGain! *Gold.
THETREASURER-CRACKED_SHIELD.title: Cracked Shield
THETREASURER-CRACKED_SHIELD.description: #Gain !B! *Block. If a *Resin *Relic was destroyed this turn, apply !VulnAmt! *Vulnerable to all enemies.
THETREASURER-CRIPPLE.title: Cripple
THETREASURER-DEBT_COLLECT.title: Debt Collect
THETREASURER-DIRECT_DEPOSIT.title: Closing Time
THETREASURER-DIRECT_DEPOSIT.description: #Deal !D! damage !Hits! time(s). Create a random shop *Resin *Relic.
THETREASURER-ENCHANTED_STRIKE.title: Enchanted Strike
THETREASURER-ENCHANTED_STRIKE.descriptio: #Deal !D! damage. If this card is enchanted, deal !BonusDmg! more damage.
THETREASURER-G_CHECK.title: G Check
THETREASURER-G_CHECK.description: #Deal !CD! damage. If the enemy intends to attack, deal double damage and gain 10 *Gold.
THETREASURER-GIVE_UP.title: Give Up
THETREASURER-HELPING_HAND.title: Helping Hand
THETREASURER-HELPING_HAND.description: #Gain !B! *Block. Enchant a card in your *Hand with *Nimble 2 this combat.
THETREASURER-MELT_DOWN.title: Melt Down
THETREASURER-MELT_DOWN.description: #Deal !D! damage. If a *Resin *Relic was destroyed this turn, deal !BonusDmg! more damage.
THETREASURER-EMERGENCY_FUND.title: Emergency Fund
THETREASURER-COMPOUND_INTEREST.title: Compound Interest
THETREASURER-COMPOUND_INTEREST.descripti: #At end of turn, gain -10%-+15%+ of your current *Gold (max 100).
THETREASURER-FINE_PRINT.title: Fine Print
THETREASURER-FINE_PRINT.description: #Lose 20 *Gold. Choose a card in your *Hand. Enchant it with *Replay 2 this turn.
THETREASURER-FORECLOSURE.title: Foreclosure
THETREASURER-FORECLOSURE.description: #Deal damage equal to half your *Gold.+ to all enemies.+ Lose all *Gold.
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW.title: Arcane Flow
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW.description: #The first enchanted card you play each turn costs 0.+ and draws 1.+
THETREASURER-ARTIFICE.title: Artifice
THETREASURER-ARTIFICE.description: #Lose -80-+50+ *Gold. Choose a card in your *Hand to permanently enchant. If *Power, apply *Swift 2. If *Attack, apply *Sharp 2. If *Skill, apply *Nimble 2.
THETREASURER-BAG_SEARCH.title: Bag Search
THETREASURER-BAG_SEARCH.description: #Choose a card from your *Draw Pile and add it to your *Hand. Lose -10-+5+ *Gold.
THETREASURER-CASH_OUT.title: Cash Out
THETREASURER-CASH_OUT.description:
#Lose 15 *Gold. Upgrade all cards in your hand for this combat.
-*Exhaust.-
THETREASURER-COUNTERFEIT.title: Counterfeit
THETREASURER-COUNTERFEIT.description: #Make a *Resin copy of -1 non Resin relic-+2 non Resin relics+.
